title: ALLMODS
description: everything u need in a modpack
body:
-**This modpack will enhance your Minecraft experience, from building to adventuring**
-300 mods
-20+ bosses
> included **CREATE MOD**
-biome o plenty+
-200+ structure..(when dungeon arise, ....)
-many dimentions( aether, twilight forest, minecells, other side, bumblezone..)
-enhanced mobs( more mobs variant)
-challenging bosses and mobs
-better aquatic 
-better end, nether
-better ender dragon
-more weapons
> -https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true( stay true resourse pack), [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/staytrue-nobushyleaves](no bushy leaves addon). by haimcfly

( if e4mc has problems, radmin vpn is an alternative)
